description: Hizmet ve marka sayfalarında Mintlify Card component'leri (Card, CardGroup) çok az kullanılıyor. Sadece su-aritma-sistemleri.mdx CardGroup kullanıyor. Marka sayfalarında Card component'leri marka logoları ve kısa açıklamalar için idealdir. Hizmet sayfalarında da ilgili marka veya alt hizmetleri göstermek için CardGroup kullanılabilir. Bu görev, mevcut sayfalara Card component'lerinin eklenmesini kapsar.

steps.name: Convert service page brand listings to CardGroup
Convert brand page service listings to Card components

log.outcome: Well-structured specification with a clear mission, concrete per-file conversion rules, and appropriate file scope. The reference pattern from `su-aritma-sistemleri.mdx` is correctly identified, the "Do NOT" section properly excludes files with custom HTML patterns, and dependencies on FN-005/FN-002 are noted. Minor inaccuracies in brand counts and heading names exist but won't cause the work to produce incorrect results.

Thorough, well-structured specification with clear file listing, icon mapping tables, and verification steps. However, it has a **critical underspecification gap** for `gunes-enerjisi.mdx` — the file's brand-listing pattern doesn't match any of the documented transformation rules, leaving the executor without guidance on how to handle multi-brand inline bullets. Additionally, the reference page icon convention contradicts the spec's own icon mapping table, which will confuse executors.
